consent.title: What do you want to share with {app}?
consent.subtitle: {app} is asking for the following from {domain}. Choose what to share. You can change this later by signing in again.
consent.no_value: you haven't added this yet — nothing will be sent
consent.add_value_placeholder: Add a value to share now
consent.cancelled_body: You cancelled signing in and nothing was shared. You can close this window.
consent.updated_request_default_reason: The app changed what it wants to use.
login.title: LinkKeys Login
local_rp.login.subtitle: {app} — an app on your local network or this device — wants you to sign in here. This app's identity is a cryptographic key, not a verified domain.
local_rp.login.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please wait and try again.
local_rp.login.admin_account_blocked: This is an administrator account and cannot be used to sign in to applications.
local_rp.consent.unverified_badge: {app} — unverified app, name chosen by the app itself
local_rp.consent.warning: This app's identity is not verified by a domain — it can only be recognized by its cryptographic key. Only continue if you trust this app.
local_rp.consent.callback_host_label: This app will receive your sign-in at:
local_rp.pending.title: Waiting for approval
local_rp.pending.body: {app} is not yet approved to sign in at this server. An administrator has been notified and will need to review it before this app can be used here. Please try again later.
local_rp.error.malformed: This sign-in link could not be read. Please ask the app to try signing in again.
local_rp.error.signature_invalid: This sign-in request could not be verified. Please ask the app to try signing in again.
local_rp.error.expired: This sign-in request has expired. Please ask the app to try signing in again.
local_rp.error.bad_scheme: This app asked us to send your login somewhere that isn't a web page, so we stopped. Nothing happened to your account.
local_rp.error.no_common_suite: This app and this server could not agree on a way to protect your login securely, so we stopped. Nothing happened to your account.
local_rp.error.policy_disabled: This server does not allow signing in from apps like this one.
local_rp.error.rejected: This app is not allowed to sign in here.
local_rp.error.pending_cap_reached: Too many apps are waiting for approval right now. Please try again later or contact your administrator.
local_rp.error.required_claim_missing: This app needs information you did not share, so we stopped. Nothing was sent to the app.
local_rp.error.replayed: This sign-in link has already been used. Please ask the app to start a new sign-in.
local_rp.error.login_proof_invalid: Your sign-in could not be verified. Please start the sign-in again.
local_rp.error.internal: Something went wrong. Please try again.
identity.title: My Identity
identity.intro: Fill in what you'd like to be able to share. "Confirmed by {domain}" means {domain} checked the value, so sites can trust it came from you.
identity.share_any: Share this with every app, without asking me each time
identity.request_verification_link: Ask someone to confirm this about you →
identity.verified_credentials_intro: What you hold and who confirms each one.
identity.no_policies: Your domain hasn't enabled any self-service claims yet.
identity.profiles_intro: Separate personas you can present to different sites. Linkage between them is yours to reveal — never the system's.
verify.title: Ask someone to confirm this about you
verify.intro: Ask a trusted third party (a government office, a company, even a neighbor) to confirm something about you. They sign it; anyone can later check their signature.
verify.result_body: Show this to {issuer}, or save/print it. It asks them to confirm: {types}. Valid for a couple of days.
account.title: Account Dashboard
claim.display_name.label: Display name
claim.display_name.description: The name shown to sites you sign in to.
claim.handle.label: Handle
claim.website.label: Website
claim.avatar_url.label: Avatar URL
claim.avatar_url.description: A link to your profile picture.
claim.email.label: Email address
claim.email.description: Confirmed by a link sent to your inbox.
claim.email_verified.label: Email confirmed
claim.email_verified.description: Set automatically once your email address is confirmed.
claim.legal_name.label: Legal name
claim.legal_name.description: Your full legal name, confirmed by a trusted third party.
claim.date_of_birth.label: Date of birth
claim.date_of_birth.description: Confirmed by a trusted third party.
claim.age_over_21.label: Age over 21
claim.age_over_21.description: Confirmed by a trusted third party.
claim.linkidspec_signed.label: LinkID Spec signed
claim.linkidspec_signed.description: Confirmed by a trusted third party.
claim.given_name.label: First name
claim.family_name.label: Last name
claim.phone.label: Phone number
claim.phone.description: A phone number you can be reached at.
claim.pronouns.label: Pronouns
claim.pronouns.description: The pronouns you'd like used for you.
claim.address.label: Address
